annotations.text: A representation of a company's revenue by quarter

annotation.text: The horizontal coordinate represents the quarter and the vertical coordinate represents the revenue
Using just the first basis vector, we approximate the revenue in each quarter as 9.775
Using the second basis vector, we obtain averages over the two halves of the year
During the first half of the year, the average revenue was 11.7 million dollars
During the second half of the year, the average revenue was 7.85 million dollars
The revenue in the four quarters
The revenue in the first quarter was 10.3 million dollars
The revenue in the second quarter was 13.1 million dollars
The revenue in the third quarter was 7.5 million dollars
The revenue in the fourth quarter was 8.2 million dollars
